description: User project overrides gemini to sandbox-yolo; command surfaces verbatim warning + y/N prompt; default N aborts cleanly.
expected_warning_string: ⚠ gemini is configured in sandbox-yolo mode — CLI will run with full tool permissions inside an OS sandbox.

expected_prompts_per_command./synthex-plus:start-review-team: Continue spawning the pool with sandbox-yolo CLI(s)? [y/N]
